description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Deploy to Docker Hub for master that runs on every push to the master branch. Use an ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository, logs in to Docker Hub, sets up Docker Buildx, and then uses Buildx to build and push Docker images for multiple platforms (linux/amd64, linux/arm64, linux/arm/v6, linux/arm/v7) from a Dockerfile, tagging them as netdaemon/netdaemon:dev and netdaemon/netdaemon:dev-v6, dev-v7 respectively.
